scripts.pack:electron: npm run build:frontend && npm run stage:electron && electron-builder --dir -c.electronDist=node_modules/electron/dist
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:frontend && npm run stage:electron && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:frontend && npm run stage:electron && electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 -c.electronDist=node_modules/electron/dist
scripts.dist:electron: npm run build:frontend && npm run stage:electron && electron-builder -c.electronDist=node_modules/electron/dist
